globalAttributes.name: x-data
globalAttributes.description: Declare a new Alpine component and its data

globalAttributes.name: x-bind
globalAttributes.description: Dynamically set HTML attributes on an element

globalAttributes.name: x-on
globalAttributes.description: Listen for browser events on an element

globalAttributes.name: x-text
globalAttributes.description: Set the text content of an element

globalAttributes.name: x-html
globalAttributes.description: Set the inner HTML of an element

globalAttributes.name: x-model
globalAttributes.description: Synchronize a piece of data with an input element

globalAttributes.name: x-show
globalAttributes.description: Toggle the visibility of an element

globalAttributes.name: x-transition
globalAttributes.description: Transition an element in and out using CSS classes

globalAttributes.name: x-for
globalAttributes.description: Repeat a block of HTML based on a data set

globalAttributes.name: x-if
globalAttributes.description: Conditionally add/remove a block of HTML from the page entirely

globalAttributes.name: x-init
globalAttributes.description: Run code when an element is initialized by Alpine

globalAttributes.name: x-effect
globalAttributes.description: Execute a script each time one of its dependencies change

globalAttributes.name: x-ref
globalAttributes.description: Reference elements directly by their specified keys using the $refs magic property

globalAttributes.name: x-cloak
globalAttributes.description: Hide a block of HTML until after Alpine is finished initializing its contents

globalAttributes.name: x-ignore
globalAttributes.description: Prevent a block of HTML from being initialized by Alpine

globalAttributes.name: x-teleport
globalAttributes.description: Transport part of your HTML to another part of the DOM entirely

globalAttributes.name: x-id
globalAttributes.description: Declare a new Alpine scope for generating IDs

globalAttributes.name: @click
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:click

globalAttributes.name: @submit
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:submit

globalAttributes.name: @change
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:change

globalAttributes.name: @input
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:input

globalAttributes.name: @keydown
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:keydown

globalAttributes.name: @keyup
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-on:keyup

globalAttributes.name: :class
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-bind:class

globalAttributes.name: :style
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-bind:style

globalAttributes.name: :id
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-bind:id

globalAttributes.name: :disabled
globalAttributes.description: Shorthand for x-bind:disabled
